root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

confirm_date.text: วันที่ยืนยัน

book_date.text: วันที่พิมพ์

root.sql:
select sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no)as mem_name --ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 6 ) || ' หมู่ที่ '||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 8 )||(CASE pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 9 ) WHEN '-' THEN '' ELSE ' ถนน '|| pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 9 ) END) as address_1
,'ตำบล'||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 11 ) ||' อำเภอ'||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 12 )as address_2
, 'จังหวัด'||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 13 )||' '|| pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no,('0')::text, 14 ) as address_3
,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date!','SD MONTH YYYY')as book_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date,'SD MONTH YYYY')as book_date2 ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = to_date('30/09/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') /*WHERE*/

r_tnma_confirm_shr_lon_dep_nest.sql:
select (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then 'ค่าหุ้น' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then 'เงินกู้' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then 'เงินฝาก' end )as data_group
, (select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code from sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type) as loan_group
, (select sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name from sc_dep_m_rule where sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type)as deposit_name , (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then pka_com_function.fp_form_conno(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then pka_com_function.fp_form_depno(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) end)as data_refno_format
, sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = {1} and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = {0} and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group not in ('ISU')
order by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group desc , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type
